title: Can't find an option to filter on a set range of dates

posts.author: Daniel3 (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I am new user to Monday.com. We have an existing board that is set to a date range of 12/05/22 to 01/01/23. In advanced filters I see no option to filter on date. I have researched help to understand how to add a date column but it does not show up as a selection option. So I am stuck figuring out how to revise this board so it shows be activities tied to the range of February and March. Thanks for your help.
